description:
Resolve the remaining fz2 source-surface failures from the fz-rh2.9 sweep after compiler2 has finished the upstream definition-macro cutover in `fz-rh2.16.11`: keyword_lists, no_parens_call, no_parens_do, no_parens_keyword, sample_tests, sample_tests_module.

This ticket is no longer allowed to patch around definition/publication structure. By the time it starts, top-level scope-shaping definitions should already enter compiler2 through compiler macros plus `Fz.Compiler.define(..., __ENV__)`, with raw function facts staying lazy behind demand. What remains here are front-door/source-surface contract gaps above that seam: unsupported keyword/no-parens surface forms, item-level test macro handling once the definition model is unified, and test module main/root policy.

Signal: each remaining surface is either supported through normal source expansion and fixture-matrix fz2 paths on top of the unified definition model, or explicitly declared outside the compiler2 cutover contract.
title: Fix fz2 source-surface parser and item macro gaps
